COMPANY INTRODUCTION
YBICO is a prominent name in the packaging tools industry, with a rich history that spans over 40 years. We specialize in providing a wide variety of packaging tools, designed to meet various material and situational needs. Our product range is extensive, featuring over 500 different types of tools, all manufactured in Taiwan, which guarantees high quality.
We see ourselves as more than just manufacturers. We are problem solvers and consultants in the packaging tools sector. Our approach is centered around our customers, constantly adapting to the latest market trends and technological advancements. This customer-focused mindset has shaped us into a one-stop-shop for packaging solutions, capable of delivering standard products within an impressive 25-day period.
Our client base is diverse, including companies involved in mail order and catalogues, e-commerce platforms, and recognizable brands like 3M. We also cater to importers, traders, and manufacturers of various packaging materials such as strapping, tape, film, paper rolls, and bubble wrap. This range of clients showcases our ability to meet a wide array of packaging needs.
